name: Brown Sugar Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Beat the egg yolks and add 1/2 cup of milk.
3. Stir in brown sugar, salt, cornstarch, and 1 1/2 cups milk. Mix well and cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until bubbly and thick.
4. Remove from heat and stir in butter and vanilla. Pour into the prepared pie shell.
5. Beat egg whites until frothy. Gradually add granulated sugar and beat until stiff peaks form. Spread meringue over pie.
6. Bake in the preheated oven until meringue is golden brown.
